## Context

- Finding ID: F###
- Linked issue: #
- Blocker: architecture / ownership / risk acceptance

## Decision Needed

Describe the tradeoff and the decision required to unblock remediation.

## Exit Criteria

- [ ] Owner assigned
- [ ] Decision recorded
- [ ] Findings register updated
